name: QA 893
description:
PCP QA Test No. 893

Exercise fix for RH BZ 1365424 where init script terminates

like-named processes.



Really a test for _get_pids_by_name() from /etc/pcp.env, as invoked

from the pmcd "rc" script.



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos7 reproduce

output mismatch (see 893.out.bad)
2c2,3

---

> Local pmcd count: 0
3a5
> /usr/libexec/pcp/bin/pmsignal: line 123: kill: (45895) - No such process
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h ed1244330104 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h ed1244330104 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h ed1244330104 -f simple.numfetch
